details: ATANH: compute kernel=eltwise_sfpu.cpp, SFPU_OP_CHAIN_0 expands to atanh_tile(0), init=atanh_tile_init(), approx_mode=false (default case), macro=SFPU_OP_ATANH_INCLUDE

Read unary_op_utils.cpp: SWISH uses SFPU_OP_SWISH_INCLUDE macro, swish_tile_init()/swish_tile(i) API, compute kernel eltwise_sfpu.cpp. get_op_approx_mode returns false (default case). Non-parameterized init.
SINH: compute kernel=eltwise_sfpu.cpp, SFPU_OP_CHAIN_0 expands to sinh_tile(0), approx_mode=false, macro=SFPU_OP_SINH_INCLUDE
HARDSHRINK not found in unary_op_utils.cpp - deep-nuked repo. Need to find SFPU implementation directly.
Found tanhshrink_kernel.cpp - specialized compute kernel using tanh_tile() + binary_dest_reuse_tiles(ELWSUB). Now tracing tanh SFPU implementation.
Found two compute kernels: hardshrink_kernel.cpp (binary_dest_reuse_tiles approach) and hardshrink_kernel_sfpu.cpp (copy_tile/add/sub approach). Both use fill_tile, ltz_tile, gtz_tile SFPU ops.

API: tt_metal/hw/inc/api/compute/eltwise_unary/swish.h, LLK: llk_math_eltwise_unary_sfpu_swish.h (WH/BH identical), Params: llk_math_eltwise_unary_sfpu_params.h, Core: ckernel_sfpu_swish.h. APPROX=false (get_op_approx_mode default). VectorMode::RC (4 faces). ADDR_MOD_7 only (dest.incr=0).
Confirmed: ckernel_sfpu_tanh.h was nuked in Phase 1. tanhshrink_kernel.cpp exists but tanh_tile() LLK dispatch is missing. Will analyze available structure and document what exists vs what is nuked.

Swish kernel uses SFPI abstractions: dst_reg load/store (SFPLOAD/SFPSTORE), abs (SFPABS), vFloat arithmetic (SFPMAD for mul/add), v_if/v_endif (SFPSETCC/SFPENCC/SFPPUSHC/SFPPOPC/SFPCOMPC), vConst1 (SFPLOADI). No raw TTI instructions - pure SFPI style.
APPROX=false (from get_op_approx_mode default case). sinh_tile_init() has no template param, uses APPROX constexpr. sinh_init() is empty (no programmable constants).

key_findings: Uses SFPI abstractions: exexp, setexp, int32_to_float, vFloat arithmetic, dst_reg. IEEE754 log decomposition with cubic minimax polynomial. WH and BH implementations identical.

addr_mod: ADDR_MOD_7 (all zeroes) for both WH and BH

details: SFPNONLINEAR is Quasar-only. On WH/BH, tanh is computed from exp primitives (sigmoid variant). ckernel_sfpu_tanh.h was nuked. The original implementation likely used exp-based sigmoid to compute tanh = 2*sigmoid(2x) - 1.

Found all SFPU implementations: ckernel_sfpu_comp.h has _calculate_comp_, _calculate_zero_comp_ (uses apply_zero_comp<SfpuType::less_than_zero> for ltz and apply_zero_comp<SfpuType::greater_than_zero> for gtz), and ckernel_sfpu_fill.h has _calculate_fill_. The hardshrink kernel uses a hybrid FPU+SFPU approach.

key_findings: tanh ckernel (ckernel_sfpu_tanh.h) deleted in Phase 1 nuke. LLK dispatch (llk_math_eltwise_unary_sfpu_tanh) also deleted. API header declarations survive. binary_dest_reuse_tiles for FPU subtract survives. SFPNONLINEAR(tanh) is Quasar-only.

details: calculate_sinh uses SFPI abstractions (vFloat, vInt, dst_reg, v_if). Style A applies. exp_21f helper implements 2^z via Moroz et al. 2022 algorithm. _float_to_int32_positive_ is UNDEFINED in the codebase. Key SFPU instructions: SFPMUL, SFPADD, SFPMAD (via negate+add), SFPDIVP2 (addexp), SFPEXEXP, SFPEXMAN, SFPSETEXP, SFPSETSGN, SFPCAST, SFPSTOCHRND, SFPLOAD, SFPSTORE.

HARDSHRINK uses a dedicated compute kernel (hardshrink_kernel.cpp / hardshrink_kernel_sfpu.cpp) instead of eltwise_sfpu.cpp+SFPU_OP_CHAIN_0. It is a hybrid FPU+SFPU kernel that composes fill_tile, add/sub/mul_binary_tile (FPU), and ltz_tile/gtz_tile (SFPU comparison) operations.

init_func: fill_tile_init(), ltz_tile_init(), gtz_tile_init(), add_binary_tile_init(), sub_binary_tile_init(), mul_binary_tile_init()

details: Wrote swish_analysis.md to .claude-analysis/softcap-1/. Includes: unary dispatch summary, approximation mode resolution, abstraction layers, call chain, params dispatch summary, annotated SFPU kernel source (Style A), SFPU instructions table, register usage, address mode config, and local knowledge sources.

key_findings: ltz_tile uses _calculate_zero_comp_<SfpuType::less_than_zero> via apply_zero_comp which checks v >= 0, sets 0 or 1. gtz_tile uses _calculate_zero_comp_<SfpuType::greater_than_zero> via apply_zero_comp which checks v > 0. fill_tile uses _calculate_fill_ which writes constant to all dst_reg rows.
Piecewise sigmoid approximation (degree-3 poly + linear + saturation) using SFPI abstractions. WH and BH implementations identical. APPROXIMATION_MODE unused.
